title: Create and Conquer
description:
A pack of mods I put together to enjoy with my friends.

It includes many Create mods, Cobblemon, some QoL mods, performance mods, and expansions onto the game.
body:
This modpack is honestly mainly for me and my friends but since downloading a pack from Google Drive is a pain in the... place, I uploaded it here.

The modpack includes some fun mods like Minecraft Comes Alive and Happiness (is a) Warm Gun.

By category, you'll be getting mods for performance, QoL, extra weapons, tools, armour, additions to the end and nether, the ability to travel to space, mobs, dungeons, and (my personal favorite) the mod that brings the tale of Herobrine to life, From the Fog.

Just a heads up, before playing a world, the game will warn you about an entity being in the game. This warning is from From the Fog, it just means the mod is there and Herobrine is watching.
